---
description: Instructions for GitHub Copilot
---

## Chat

Chat responses should be efficient and concise. Don't suggest next steps unless I explicitly ask for them.

## Git commit messages

If you make a git commit, add a git trailer with your model and version details in this format:
`Assisted-by: MODEL_NAME (MODEL_VERSION)`

<!-- vim: set syntax=markdown textwidth=0 linebreak spell spelllang=en_au,en_gb: -->
